{{Quote|Governor Dannal and Senator Chelo have been ordered to report to the Emperor on Coruscant to explain their failure to eradicate the disease of rebellion while it was yet in its embryonic stage.|[[Imperial HoloVision]] report|<ref name="GNN3" />}}
'''Chelo''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] who represented the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gerrard V]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. Following a [[Gerrard V Rebels|rebel]] [[Uprising on Gerrard V|uprising]] on the planet that had to be put down by elements of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], Chelo and [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Dannal]] were ordered to report to [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to explain why they failed to prevent the spread of rebellion on Gerrard V.
